findings: Top-ranked feature pairs exhibit perfect or near-perfect correlation indicating strong redundancy.
High redundancy coexists with top individual feature rankings, confirming the tension between redundancy and apparent importance.
Relation verification was successfully bounded within the local context, preserving provenance and epistemic caution.
contradictions: Tension between redundancy and top-rank importance remains unresolved but preserved as a local contradiction.
limitations: Relation verification outside the bounded local context was not possible, limiting cross-context synthesis.
